title: Senior Financial Analyst - United India Insurance Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - United India Insurance Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with United India Insurance Capital India! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Ahmedabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About United India Insurance Capital India:
United India Insurance Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance Capital India!
